titleStmt.title: SII 6.928: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 928. (A.R. No. 297 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-FIFTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakahāyanē guṇadharābhānvaṁkkitē karkkaṭē saṁkrāntē mihirē sitē pratipadi śrīmannṛsiṁhāgrataḥ . nityākhaṁḍasadaṁḍadīpayugaḷasthityai dvayōrggōpa
yōḥ prādātbastaśataṁ praśastivijayaśrīkīrttipūrttyāptayē . 1 patmapāyakarāyasya tanayassunayassudhīḥ . śrīnāgumaṁḍalīkākhyaḥ kaḷi
ṁggadaḷamaṁḍanaḥ . 2 bhāryyayā bhavyayā bhūriguṇayā māṁkamākhyayā nāyakyā saha saddharmmavṛttaśīlakulāḍhyayā [. 3*]
svasti śrī . śakavarṣaṁbulu 1213 gunēṁṭṭi śrīmadanantavarmma pratāpa vīra śrīnarasiṁhadēvarala pravarddhamāna vijayarājyasaṁvvatsaraṁbulu 15
gu śrāhi śukla prathamayu bṛhaspativāramunāṁṭi karkkāṭaka saṁkrāntiyaṁdu patmapāyakarāyani koḍku kaḷiṁgadaḷa nāgumahāma
ṁḍalīkuṁḍu Atidharmmaśīlayagucunna tana bhāryya māṁkamanāyakaṟālisahituṁḍai tamaku nāyurārōgyaiśvaryyā
bhivṛddhigā śrīnarasiṁhanādhuni sannidhiyaṁdu nityamunnu dīpadaṁḍusahitamaina reṁḍu Akhaṁḍadīpālu veluṁguṭaku vāribōyu koḍku pō
tubōyuvaśamuna Oka neṟadīpāna keṁbhaI goṟiyalunnu pallaAllāḍibōyuvaśamuna noka neṟadīpāna keṁbaI goṟiyaluṁggā reṁḍu Akha
ṁḍa dīpālakunnu nūṟu goṟiya lācaṁdrārkasthāyiṁgāṁ beṭṭe nī dharmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa . śrī śrī śrī . 0 .
Digital edition of SII 6.928 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
